distance_km.note: Main race is 50 km cross-country ski race confirmed across multiple sources

elevation_m.note: No web sources in search results provide total elevation gain data for the course

country.note: Event takes place in China, specifically in Changchun, Jilin Province

region_state_province.note: Located in Jilin Province in northeast China (Dongbei region). Source states 'north-east of China' and 'Jilin Province'

discipline.note: Described as '50 km cross-country ski race' in classic technique

typical_participants.note: Source states 'gathers each edition about 800 participants from around the world'. 2026 had 2,227 athletes but this includes professional athletes and multiple race distances (50km, 25km, 6km, 1.5km, 0.3km), so 800 is reasonable for typical/historical participation

year_founded.note: First race held on March 15, 2003 with 750 registered participants

official_website_url.note: The provided URL (vasaloppet.cn) does not appear in search results. The official website is vasaloppetchina.com, confirmed across multiple sources

typical_race_date.note: Event consistently held in early January. 2026 edition was January 4, 2025 edition was January 4, confirming first weekend of January pattern
